items.title: Ex-Bama DT pleads guilty after posing as NFLers

items.title: Draft 1st round 3rd-most watched, down from '25

items.title: A capsule look at the Colts’ 8 draft picks
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS — The Indianapolis Colts injected eight draft picks into their roster, including two projected starters this week. Second-round pick CJ Allen, a linebacker out of Georgia, and third-rounder A.J. Haulcy, an LSU safety, bring immediate impact potential. That’s especially true with Allen, who’ll replaced Zaire Franklin and run the defense from the Mike position. [...]

That would have been an ideal time for the Colts to resolve trade requests two players submitted. In Richardson’s instance, no team was [...]

Actually, more than that. “I’m the first-round pick two times,’’ Gardner said. This year, and in 2027. That [...]
